title: Non-record: Shared-Core 8/12 @ 896 on 1xH100 SXM (1.9998 val_bpb)
author: Janksuu

data.description: Shared-core recurrent transformer with recurrent depth across 12 recurrence steps and 8 stored layers.
Input and output embeddings are tied.

novel_contributions: Validated a near-cap shared-core recurrent transformer on real cloud hardware (1xH100 SXM).
Demonstrated stable repeatability with nearly identical post-roundtrip val_bpb on a repeated run.
Used a compact 16MB submission built from int8 quantization plus zlib compression.
